name: I'm in the ocean
hints: You are in the ocean! Most directions loop. You need to get back to shore.
Go SOUTH to return to the lagoon. North, East, and West all loop back here.
Go SOUTH to reach the shallow lagoon (room 24). Swimming without proper items is dangerous.
notes: Open ocean - most exits loop. Only SOUTH leads to the lagoon (room 24). Fish are here but dangerous to linger. Get back to shore quickly.
